Layers_052023_release\MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_MASTER,SHAPE__Area,-1,-1,MSAnMSA_EComm_03222024_UNQ,Shape_Area,-1,-1" NO_SOURCE_INFO
CalculateField MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_03222024Update affgeoid_cty_2020 "0500000US"+!geoid_cty_2020! Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_03222024Update msa_qual "Non_MSA" Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_03222024Update msa_qual "MSA" Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_03222024Update fee_qual_status "Yes" Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_03222024Update ec_qual_status "Yes" Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

CalculateField MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_03222024Update label_ec "is an energy community, as it meets both the Fossil Fuel Employment (FFE) threshold and the unemployment rate requirement" Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_03222024Update msa_nmsa_label !msa_area_name! Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_03222024Update msa_nmsa_label !msa_area_name!+" (MSA)" Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

CalculateField MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_03222024Update msa_nmsa_label Replace($feature.msa_nmsa_label, "nonmetropolitan area", "non-metropolitan statistical area (Non-MSA)") Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

CalculateField MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_03222024Update msa_nmsa_label Replace($feature.msa_nmsa_label, "Metropolitan Statistical Area (MSA)", "metropolitan statistical area (MSA)") Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_03222024Update label_fee "return null" Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_03222024Update dataset_version 2023.3 Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_03222024Update date_last_update DateOnly() Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_03222024Update date_last_update DateOnly(2024,04,29) Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_03222024Update date_last_update 5/29/2024 Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_03222024Update date_last_update Date() Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_03222024Update date_record_added Date(2024,02,22) Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_03222024Update date_last_update Date(2024,04,29) Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
AddGlobalIDs MSAnMSA_EnergyComm_03222024Update
CalculateField "2023 MSAs/Non-MSAs that are Energy Communities" label_ec Replace($feature.label_ec, "is an","is a 2023") Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField "2023 MSAs/Non-MSAs that are Energy Communities" msa_nmsa_label Replace($feature.msa_nmsa_label, "Non-MSA","non-MSA") Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
